subtitle: The Puget Sound shore where the schooner Exact landed the Denny Party on November 13, 1851 — Seattle's founding.
spike_statement: On a rainy November 13, 1851, the schooner Exact put twelve adults and twelve children ashore here, and Seattle dates its founding to this beach.

levers.photo_tone: Puget Sound grey-blue water and an overcast sky over driftwood-pale sand, the green-painted Liberty replica the one bright vertical
